sentiment.summary: Oil surges 8.7% toward $95 as US-Iran war re-escalates, crushing yesterday's relief rally and triggering stagflation fears across all asset classes.

insights.text: Stagflation fears back with a vengeance. Oil ripped 8.7% to $95 as the US-Iran conflict intensifies into day 12. S&P 500 -1.2%, NASDAQ -1.6%, VIX at 24.58. IEA's 400M barrel reserve dump failed to cap crude. Yesterday's relief rally is gone.

Bitcoin holding $70K but still below your cost basis. BTC at $69,853, -4.5% below your $73,135 avg. Spot ETF inflows of $115M on March 11 offer structural support, but oil-driven macro fear and war uncertainty make a near-term recovery hard to time.

Rocket Lab unstoppable — 16% above your cost basis. Closed at $71.96 (+4.4%), well above your $62.04 avg. Record $602M FY revenue (+36% YoY), 38% gross margins, 83rd launch completed. Buy consensus, avg PT $69 — already printing. Strong hold.

EchoStar near breakeven — forced S&P buying incoming. At $110.09, just 4% below your $114.33 cost. S&P 500 inclusion triggers passive buying before March 23 open. $42.65B AT&T/SpaceX spectrum sale transforms the balance sheet. Hold into the catalyst.

T1 Energy up 25% from cost — solar thesis validated. At $8.42 vs your $6.73 avg (+25.1%). 900MW Treaty Oak supply deal locked in, Texas 5GW TOPCon facility starting production by end of 2026. Strong Buy consensus, avg PT $10.71. Momentum intact.

Seagate rebounding — down 14% from basis, was 21% yesterday. STX at $385.23 vs your $448.98 avg. AI/cloud HDD demand accelerating with 42% gross margins. Analysts target $475. The gap is narrowing but macro selloff caps upside near-term. Patient hold.

Telesat stuck below cost — execution risk until LEO launches. At $30.84, -7.5% below your $33.33 avg. Canadian Armed Forces satellite contract and Lightspeed LEO first launch Dec 2026 are real milestones. Earnings March 26. All catalyst, no revenue yet — high risk.

BigBear.ai still down 54% from your $9.02 basis. At $4.11, bleeding slow. Q4 revenue fell 37.7% YoY. Special stockholder meeting passed, Ask Sage acquisition adds AI optionality. 17% growth guided for 2026 — but it needs to be proven. One bad quarter away from trouble.

Nvidia's $2B bet on Nebius is closing your gap fast. NBIS at $109.70 after surging 16% on Nvidia's strategic investment and Rubin GPU campus deal. Still $21 below your $131.12 avg, but the story is fundamentally rerating. 300MW New Jersey campus, 5GW by decade end.

Oklo down 54% from your $125 cost — thesis building slowly. At $57.82. Meta's 1.2GW advanced nuclear campus deal and Centrus HALEU JV are major milestones. Earnings March 17 next catalyst. BofA upgraded to Buy, $127 PT. The thesis is real — the timeline is not.

Navitas finally above your $10 cost basis after monster launch. At $10.83 (+8.3% from avg) after yesterday's +24.9% surge. New 5th-gen GeneSiC QDPAK platform targets AI power racks and data centers directly. This is the product cycle inflection you've been waiting for.
